decks.notes: Utilizing artifacts to quickly put pressure on opponents, this deck aims to overwhelm them with aggressive creatures and powerful synergy. With a focus on deploying artifacts efficiently and utilizing cards like Urza's Saga to generate value, the deck seeks to control the battlefield and close out games efficiently. Cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide disruption against opposing strategies, while Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Welding Jar offer resilience and card advantage. The deck is designed to consistently apply pressure and force opponents to react quickly or risk being overwhelmed.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deploy artifacts onto the battlefield, leveraging the power of cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal to generate advantage. The deck includes various cheap artifacts that can be sacrificed or used for additional effects, while also running disruptive elements like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The synergy between artifacts and cards like Arcbound Ravager allows for explosive plays and quick finishes, making this an aggressive and versatile Aggro - Affinity deck in the Modern format.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Fallaji Archaeologist. It also utilizes instant spells like Ephemerate and Solitude to control the board and protect the combo. The deck includes ways to dig for combo pieces with cards like Thoughtseize and Otherworldly Gaze. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent while setting up a quick and powerful reanimation combo to overwhelm them and secure the win.

This deck aims to win quickly by assembling a combo without relying on lands. It utilizes cards like Lotus Bloom and Goblin Charbelcher to generate massive amounts of mana and deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes disruption spells like Force of Negation and Disrupting Shoal to protect the combo. With a focus on controlling the game and finding key pieces with card draw spells like Preordain and Sea Gate Restoration, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can mount a defense.

This Aggro - Affinity deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck includes powerful cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to maximize the synergy with artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble. Tormod's Crypt and Engineered Explosives help control the board while Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer provide additional threats. Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing help generate more artifacts to fuel the deck's aggressive strategy, with Metallic Rebuke and Claws of Gix providing additional disruption and protection. Overall, this deck aims to flood the board with artifacts and quickly close out games.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts, especially creatures, to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. It utilizes cards that allow for fast mana production and card draw to keep the aggression going. The inclusion of powerful artifact creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary, as well as combos with cards like Arcbound Ravager and Welding Jar, make it difficult for opponents to keep up. With the ability to control the board with cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

This deck focuses on using Allosaurus Rider and Neoform to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. It also includes cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect your combo pieces and disrupt your opponent's plans. The inclusion of cards like Generous Ent and Disciple of Freyalise help to ramp up your mana quickly, while cards like Planar Genesis provide a big payoff for flooding the board with creatures. The deck is all about assembling your combo pieces efficiently and overwhelming your opponent with massive creatures.

The deck focuses on synergies between lands and artifacts to ramp up mana quickly and search for key combo pieces, ultimately leading to the win condition of casting Scapeshift to find specific lands and win the game. The key strategy revolves around efficiently tutoring for specific lands and establishing a board presence with Primeval Titan, while using Amulet of Vigor to untap lands for additional mana acceleration. The deck aims to assemble the necessary pieces for a powerful combo finish, leveraging the strength of lands like Urza's Saga and Lotus Field to create explosive turns and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent while also utilizing blink effects to generate additional value from enters-the-battlefield triggers. Cards like Ragavan and Quantum Riddler provide early pressure, while cards like Solitude and Consign to Memory provide removal options. The deck also includes powerful payoffs like Phage and Phelia, which can quickly close out the game. The inclusion of cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Ephemerate allows for flexible play and further value generation from creatures entering the battlefield.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm for removal and extra reach. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast creatures and direct damage spells, supported by cards like Goblin Bombardment for additional reach. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and buffs for the creatures, ensuring a relentless assault on the opponent's life total.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly build a board presence and pressure the opponent through fast and aggressive play. By using cards like Urza's Saga and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to generate value, along with efficient removal options like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and disrupt their game plan. Additionally, the inclusion of Tormod's Crypt and Claws of Gix allows for graveyard hate and additional utility, giving the deck flexibility in different matchups. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive creature plays combined with burn and removal spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck uses powerful red and white creatures such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to deal damage quickly, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provide additional reach and removal options. The deck also includes some control elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Path to Exile to deal with threats from the opponent, ensuring that the deck maintains pressure and control throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with cards using cards like Faithless Looting and Burning Inquiry, and then utilize Dredge cards like Life from the Loam, Stinkweed Imp, and Golgari Thug to constantly recycle cards and bring back powerful creatures like Arclight Phoenix. Other cards like Creeping Chill provide additional value while also draining your opponent's life total. The deck aims to create a fast and relentless combo-driven strategy that overwhelms opponents with a constant stream of threats from the graveyard.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures by utilizing instant spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. By putting a powerful threat like Griselbrand or Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play early, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of powerful creatures and instant reanimation spells, this deck seeks to win the game quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures from the graveyard using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending, while protecting the combo with counterspells like Force of Negation. It also utilizes cards like Ephemerate and Subtlety to disrupt opponents' strategies and maintain board control. The goal is to create overwhelming board presence and outvalue the opponent through efficient plays and resource management, ultimately leading to a quick victory through powerful creature recursion and instant-speed interactions.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending. It also uses Ephemerate to protect key creatures from removal spells and generate value. The deck also includes interaction in the form of Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to disrupt opponents' strategies. Atraxa, Grand Unifier serves as a backup win condition by providing additional value and synergy with the deck's instant reanimation strategy. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm opponents with powerful threats and disruptive interaction.
